title: Gronks+
description: A Vanilla+ adventure and performance focused modpack.
body:
Gronks+ is a light Vanilla+ modpack tailored for Minecraft 1.20.5, designed to enhance and extend the vanilla Minecraft experience with a focus on adventure and exploration. 

This pack integrates new building structures, varied weaponry, and immersive environments through mods like Cinderscapes, Terrestria and Traverse, providing new world generation and biomes which keep the game fresh and engaging, especially dimensions such as the nether and end which have had complete redesigns.

It also has improved performance tweaks and overall visual polish, including shader compatibility, Sodium and Lithium to improve stability and FPS, and simple visual improvements such as WaveyCapes.

The pack was designed originally for SMP usage however also works fine as a refreshing survival experience. 

The pack is updated regularly as additional Vanilla+ style mods release, as well as kept current with compatible mod versions.

The project will stay public on Modrinth as long as it is maintained, as it is a personal project, once I am done with it the project will be archived.
